interpretation.dexter_gap_meaning: Dexter live-versus-replay gap currently measures drift between a live close and a later stagnant-surface terminal reconstruction, not a like-for-like replay of live exit semantics.
interpretation.mewx_gap_meaning: Mew-X live-versus-replay gap currently measures whether exported session summaries agree with the live close event they summarize.
interpretation.overall: The promoted replay baseline is now explained: Dexter is limited by replay-surface coverage and exit semantics, while Mew-X shows summary-fidelity stability.

coverage_hole.source_faithful_interpretation: Dexter only materializes per-mint replay exports when a mint is moved into the stagnant_mints surface. This session closed safely above the under-price threshold and the run ended 120 seconds later, so no replay export was created before shutdown.

outlier_gap.source_faithful_interpretation: Live Dexter sold on the safe path before the later reversal, but the replay surface only preserves a later stagnant terminal path. Replay deepening therefore exits at the last exported price tick rather than the live safe exit.

mewx.interpretation: Mew-X replay stability is strong at the exported close-summary layer, but it remains summary-driven rather than an independent path replay.

dexter_exit_rule.note: Pinned Dexter exits while a live session is active when safe, malicious, or drop-time conditions fire.

dexter_replay_export_rule.note: Pinned Dexter only moves mints into the replayable stagnant_mints surface after 5m without tx or price <= 3e-8 with 30s inactivity.

mewx_session_summary_rule.note: Frozen Mew-X exports each session summary from the same session state it uses when emitting position_closed.
